---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, app, or subsystem for FerrumOS
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you trying to do?

A clear description of the capability or use case you want, not just the
implementation you imagine.

## Where does this fit?

Which layer does this touch — kernel (`src/`), a userland app
(`userland/`), the agent runtime (`heliox-daemon`), or tooling
(`scripts/`)? See [`docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) if
you're not sure.

## Proposed approach (optional)

If you have one in mind, sketch it here — doesn't need to be complete.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you didn't prefer them.

## Additional context

Anything else — related discussion, prior art, links to similar features
elsewhere.
